7979003.author: Phillip Peralez
7979003.subject: perf(philtool_core): compute_pearson_correlation — null-free contiguous-slice fast path avoids per-element Option iterator overhead (flights-1m -3.2%, RAM 669MB)

d31f7ba.author: Phillip Peralez
d31f7ba.subject: perf(philtool_core): detect_multivariate_outliers — hoist constant label format! out of outlier loop + null-free contiguous-slice matrix extraction (flights-1m -11.7%, RAM 553MB)

a349a1a.author: Phillip Peralez
a349a1a.subject: perf(philtool_core): detect_univariate_outliers — null-free contiguous-slice batch read avoids per-element Option filter_map collect (flights-1m -5.1%, RAM 654MB)

f2d0542.author: Phillip Peralez
f2d0542.subject: perf(philtool_core): extract_numeric_matrix — null-free contiguous-slice fast path avoids per-element ChunkedArray::get on 1M-row sample (flights-1m -11.9%, RAM 652MB)

9a8fa7f.author: Phillip Peralez
9a8fa7f.subject: perf(philtool_core): calculate_covariance_matrix — center each row once + symmetric upper-triangle accumulation over contiguous slices, avoiding O(ncols^2*nrows) redundant centering (flights-1m -4.8%, RAM 672MB)

786a622.author: Phillip Peralez
786a622.subject: perf(philtool_core): build_top_anomalies — defer identical per-flag variables Vec<String> until after top-N truncation, eliminating ~80K column-name vector allocs/drops (flights-1m -10.3%, RAM 651MB)

e30ab42.author: Phillip Peralez
e30ab42.subject: perf(sort): resolve_chunked_idx — branch-light linear scan over cumlens for small chunk counts in the per-element gather hot path; nyc-taxi columns have 3 chunks so the post-sort gather binary-searched cumlens once per element (polars-taxi -4.0%, RAM 1390MB) [autoperf]

1c99b0e.author: Phillip Peralez
1c99b0e.subject: perf(philtool_core): ExactQuantileCalculator::quantiles — swarm winner [algorithmic] (flights -6.746031746031746%) [autoperf]

a769d64.author: Phillip Peralez
a769d64.subject: perf(philtool_core): ryu-formatting — materialize phase4 segmentation frame once to avoid re-running numeric->String casts per group_by (taxi-full -5.66%) [autoperf]
